name: Baker's Square French Silk Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 small Box      instant chocolate pudding mix
1 9 oz Container  cool whip, whipped cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the small box of instant chocolate pudding mix using buttermilk instead of milk; set aside.
2. Dissolve 1 envelope Knox gelatine in 1/4 cup cold water with a glass measuring cup.
3. Set the dissolved gelatin mixture in a pot or pan of hot water, ensuring it remains in the cup to help dissolve further.
4. Once the gelatin is fully dissolved and clear, wire whisk it into the pudding.
5. Gently fold in 9 oz of cool whip (whipped cream) until combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pie crust.
7. Chill for a few hours before serving.
8. Garnish with chocolate shavings before serving.
